title: SHD Activation
summary: The emergency activation of secretly trained Division Agents after the Green Poison outbreak overwhelms ordinary response systems.

claims.text: SHD Agents are activated following the Green Poison outbreak after years of secret preparation.
Their immediate official mission is to help secure Midtown Manhattan against the Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion.
The player in the original game is activated as part of the Division's second wave.

paragraphs.text: The outbreak turns SHD from a concealed contingency into an active emergency force. Manhattan receives successive waves of Agents as the crisis intensifies.

timeline.label: After the outbreak — SHD deploys Agents to Manhattan

verification.notes: Wave-level personnel lists remain outside this overview pending direct collectible evidence.
